auth_failed: GitHub rejected the token. Generate a new one at github.com/settings/tokens with the 'repo' scope.
permission_denied: GitHub denied access. Ensure your token has the 'repo' scope.
repo_not_found: Repository not found. Check GITHUB_REPO is set to owner/repo-name.
rate_limited: GitHub API rate limit exceeded. Wait a few minutes and try again.
timeout: GitHub request timed out. Check your network connection.
submit_failed: Could not submit issue to GitHub: {detail}
label_bootstrap_failed: Labels not found and could not be created: {detail}
not_found: No issue file found for slug '{detail}'. Use list_issues to see available slugs.
missing_field: Issue JSON is missing required field: {detail}
